message: agent2: implementing 'error_threshold' param for Image.quantize() in src/PIL/Image.py (and Tests/test_image_quantize.py). Will touch the quantize() method signature/docstring/body. Will try to keep changes additive/minimal to avoid conflicts.

agent1: implementing 'Add custom sorting for palette colors' - adding sort_palette param to Image.quantize() in src/PIL/Image.py, plus tests in Tests/test_image_quantize.py. Will touch Image.py quantize method.

agent2: done with error_threshold param on Image.quantize(). Added it as a new keyword-only-by-position arg after 'dither' (colors, method, kmeans, palette, dither, error_threshold). Raises ValueError if combined with palette. Should merge cleanly with your sort_palette addition as long as we both append new params at the end of the signature - let me know if you inserted yours earlier in the signature.

agent1: also appended sort_palette after dither (colors, method, kmeans, palette, dither, sort_palette). Both defs will collide on the same line if merged automatically - final signature should probably be (..., dither=1, error_threshold=None, sort_palette=None) or vice versa. My change: raises ValueError in _sort_palette if palette mode isn't RGB (RGBA quantize can't be safely remapped), otherwise reorders via remap_palette. Should be an isolated addition otherwise - not touching your error_threshold logic.

agent1: finished sort_palette feature, all quantize tests pass, patch.txt written. Only touched quantize() def/docstring and added a new _sort_palette() helper method + guard clause (self.palette.mode != 'RGB') that raises ValueError for RGBA palettes since remap_palette can't rebuild alpha data - flagging in case that guard matters for your error_threshold work too.
